_purpose: This file tracks the live state of the strategy on an IBKR paper trading account. It is committed to the public repo for transparency. See data/portfolio.example.json for full field documentation.
_how_to_change_initial_capital: Edit `initial_capital_eur` BEFORE the first run. The script reads this value to initialize `cash_eur` when no positions exist yet. After the first rebalance has happened, this field is informational only — the script uses `cash_eur` and `positions` for state.
